## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to discuss content marketing progress and outbound strategy implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content marketing showing positive trends with 239 clicks and 22k impressions since September](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Outbound email campaign setup in progress, with warm-up phase starting soon](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Need to implement goal tracking in Google Analytics to measure content effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Focus on creating bottom-of-funnel content to drive app downloads and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)

## Topics

### Content Marketing Progress

  - [239 clicks and 22k impressions since September](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Organic keywords growing, with several in top positions (1-3)](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Some articles ranking well shortly after publication](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Recent slump due to indexing issues, now resolved](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Top performing article: AI and crypto-related content](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Conversion Optimization

  - [Need to implement goal tracking in Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Suggestion to create more compelling CTAs and lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [Focus on bottom-of-funnel content to showcase Knapsack app capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Idea: Create case studies or product videos demonstrating value for specific user segments (e.g., financial advisors)](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

### Outbound Email Campaign Setup

  - [24 email domains set up for warm-up](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Aiming to scale up to 1000 emails per day within 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Email copy and subject lines being developed](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Will start with 5-10 micro-campaigns, scaling up based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Automations to be set up for lead tracking and response management](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)

### LinkedIn Strategy

  - [Plan to use Dripify for LinkedIn outreach after email sequences](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
  - [Will target email opens who didn't respond with LinkedIn connection requests](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
  - [Delayed start on LinkedIn outreach to focus on email campaign first](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mark to set up goal tracking in Google Analytics (possibly with consultant help)](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Jimmy/Sami to finalize email copy and subject lines](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Start email warm-up process and prepare initial campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Create bottom-of-funnel content to showcase Knapsack app capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Develop compelling lead magnets or case studies for specific user segments](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Jimmy to provide Mark with lists for Dripify (LinkedIn) outreach in about a month](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
